The gate has opened at today's G2 Kinko Sho.

Including the Kikuka Sho winner Matikanefukukitaru, our
all-star racers make their way down the 2,000-meter
course!

The standout and favorite to win has an otherworldly front
running style that has earned her three consecutive
wins—Silence Suzuka!

But will her running style be any match for today's fierce
competition?

It's a small lineup, but everyone here is top-class. Even
Suzuka should be playing it safe with her strategy...
In that case... my position is perfect!

Silence Suzuka takes the lead and enters the backstretch.
She's gone from four lengths ahead to five.

The second most popular racer, Matikanefukukitaru is
advancing from the rear.

If I keep this pace up, I should have enough left in me for
one final push in the homestretch...

Silence Suzuka continues to pick up the pace! Eight
lengths... She's nine lengths ahead of the pack!
Waaaah?! Are you kidding me, Suzuka?!

Maintaining her vast lead, Silence Suzuka is rounding the
third corner.

This all-star lineup is doing nothing to deter her runaway
speed, but the rest of the pack are still doing their best to
catch up!
But it's no use! Silence Suzuka just speeds up even more!

She's maintaining a lead of more than five lengths! The rest
of the racers have entered the homestretch!
Here we go!
This is where I put the pedal to the metal and—
Wha—
Unbelievable! Silence Suzuka may have been going fast before, but now she's going even faster!

What an incredible racer! She's widened her lead by eight
to nine lengths once again!

What amazing ability! Silence Suzuka has this in the bag!
With a lead of more than ten lengths... she's crossed the
finish line!

A landslide victory at today's G2 race! Silence Suzuka truly
is the Otherworldly Front-Runner!
